Library.Command:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON GO SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON GO
-- ============================================= -- Author: Daniel Šašek -- Create date: 2023-12-01 -- Description: -- ============================================= #MODIFIER# FUNCTION #NAME# ( @FormIdent VARCHAR(255) ,@TableID INT ,@HistoryTypeID VARCHAR(255) ,@AccountID INT ) RETURNS INT AS BEGIN
DECLARE @HistoryID INT
SELECT TOP(1) @HistoryID = his.ID FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = 1 AND his.FormIdent = '' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'Save' AND his.AccountID = 1 ORDER BY his.ID DESC
RETURN @HistoryID
END
